part_of_speech: verb (future of tener, irregular stem: tendr-)
example_sentence: Tendré una reunión mañana a las nueve.
example_translation: I will have a meeting tomorrow at nine.

translation: I will be able to (future of poder)
part_of_speech: verb (future of poder, irregular stem: podr-)
example_sentence: No podré ir a la fiesta este sábado.
example_translation: I won't be able to go to the party this Saturday.

translation: I will do / make (future of hacer)
part_of_speech: verb (future of hacer, irregular stem: har-)
example_sentence: Haré todo lo posible para ayudarte.
example_translation: I will do everything possible to help you.

translation: I will say / tell (future of decir)
part_of_speech: verb (future of decir, irregular stem: dir-)
example_sentence: Te diré la verdad cuando llegues.
example_translation: I will tell you the truth when you arrive.

translation: I will leave / go out (future of salir)
part_of_speech: verb (future of salir, irregular stem: saldr-)
example_sentence: Saldré del trabajo a las seis.
example_translation: I will leave work at six.

part_of_speech: verb (future of venir, irregular stem: vendr-)
example_sentence: Vendré a tu casa el viernes.
example_translation: I will come to your house on Friday.

part_of_speech: verb (future of haber, irregular stem: habr-)
example_sentence: Habrá mucha gente en el concierto.
example_translation: There will be a lot of people at the concert.

translation: it will be / it's probably (future of ser — also used for probability)
example_translation: Who's knocking? — It's probably the neighbor.

example_sentence: El año que viene viviremos en Guadalajara.
example_translation: Next year we will live in Guadalajara.

example_sentence: Nos veremos el domingo, si Dios quiere.
example_translation: We'll see each other Sunday, God willing.

example_sentence: En el futuro habrá más carros eléctricos.
example_translation: In the future there will be more electric cars.

part_of_speech: verb (future of querer, irregular stem: querr-)
example_sentence: Algún día querré tener mi propio negocio.
example_translation: Someday I will want to have my own business.
